En: Tremble. THE TIME IS NOW. τὰ ὅλα.
Zh: 颤栗。时间就是现在。τὰὅλα。

En: What time?
Zh: 什么时间？

En: Am I sure it's not just a joke, or some kind of coping mechanism?
Zh: 我确定这不是个笑话，或者某种应对机制吗？

En: This is because of the insane world-ending I've been saying isn't it? (Proceed.)
Zh: 是因为我一直在胡言乱语的那个世界末日理论，对吧？（继续。）

En: Time for THE SHOW. For τὰ ὅλα. The hallowed time of fear and disintegration. A countdown has begun. All will collapse on itself. The world will disappear into a single grain of blackness. All sound will be muted. All life will scream.
Zh: 演出的时间到了。τὰὅλα。恐惧与分裂的神圣时间。倒计时开始了。一切都将分崩离析。整个世界都会在一片黑暗中消失殆尽。听不见一切声响。所有生命都将发出刺耳的尖叫。

En: Yes. You spoke the words of the παλίντροπος, and the houses of Perikarnassis. Items, people, even WORDS will tumble, all will lose its meaning in the coming years. That is why you marked yourself.
Zh: 是的，你说出了那个单词*παλίντροποςe*，还有佩里卡内西的家园。所有物品，人类，甚至是言语都会崩塌，在接下来的几年中失去所有意义。这就是你给自己做记号的原因。

En: It's *totally* also a coping mechanism.
Zh: 这不*完全*就是应对机制嘛。

En: Wait, wait -- when did this *countdown* begin?
Zh: 等等——这个*倒计时*是什么时候开始的？

En: Monday morning. The moment you arrived in this reality. You are the first crack in the sheer face of god. From you it will spread.
Zh: 周一早晨，你醒过来的那一刻起。你是神明的冷峻面颊上第一道裂痕。灾难将会以你为起点蔓延。

En: I *do* think the world might end soon. (Opt in.)
Zh: 我*的确*认为这个世界可能很快会终结。（接受思想。）

En: Uhm... yeah, I'm going to opt out of the 'παλίντροπος' whatever it is. This was a mistake. (Opt out.)
Zh: 呃……是啊，不管这个“παλίντροποςe”是什么，我还是不参加了。这是个错误。（拒绝思想。）

En: Yeah... I don't think the time is *now*. Later maybe. [Leave.]
Zh: 是啊……我觉得这个时间不是*现在*。也许以后再说吧。[离开。]

En: No. You cannot *leave*. The countdown has not yet reached XERO.
Zh: 不。你不能*离开*。倒计时还没有到达XERO.

En: τὰ ὅλα? What's that?
Zh: τὰὅλα？那是什么？

En: οῦ λόγου δ' ἐόντος ξυνοῦ ζώουσιν οἱ πολλοὶ ὡς ἰδίαν ἔχοντες φρόνησιν.
Zh: οῦλόγουδ'ἐόντοςξυνοῦζώουσινοἱπολλοὶὡςἰδίανἔχοντεςφρόνησιν.

En: The face of the woman fractures. There will be herd killing. We all become vapour.
Zh: 女人的面孔碎裂了。大屠杀将会出现，我们全都会变成水蒸气。

En: Okay, yes. Maybe it *is* just the hangover talking. Or some kind of joke you're playing on yourself instead of working on the case...
Zh: 好吧，没错。也许这*只是*一些醉话。或者你对自己开的某种玩笑，为的就是不想办案……

En: I'm... a little afraid.
Zh: 我……有点害怕。

En: So you should be. The world island crumbles at your feet and in the far plain -- παλίντροπος.
Zh: 你应该这样。这个世界岛在你脚下碎裂，还有那遥远的平原——παλίντροποςe。

En: Perhaps -- just a thought -- this has something to do with the hangover?
Zh: 也许——只是个想法啊——这跟宿醉有关？

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Wait, but don't I have to be 100% cop -- to get the case finished and all that?
Zh: 等等，我不应该是个100%的警察吗——为了破案啊什么之类的？

En: Okay. If 50% art critic is what's needed to free me from rote repetition, so be it. (Opt in.)
Zh: 好吧。如果需要50%的艺术评论家把我从这些机械性的重复工作中解救出来，那就这样吧。（接受思想。）

En: No. I cannot risk another copo-diversion at this point. Go away! (Opt out.)
Zh: 不。眼下我可不能冒险转变警察类型了。快走开！（拒绝思想。）

En: Exactly. It's not *only* your duty to only catch the criminals of the street, you must also apprehend criminals of the printing press and the gallery -- the trite and derivative artists and writers of the world!
Zh: 没错。抓捕街上的罪犯不是你*唯一*的职责，你还要逮捕印刷业和画廊的罪犯——世界上那些陈腐和只会模仿的艺术家和作者！

En: Go ahead and provide savage criticisms, Art Cop. The world is yours to rip to pieces and reassemble!
Zh: 去吧，猛烈地批判吧，艺术警探。这个世界是你的，把它撕成碎片再重新拼接起来吧！

En: Quit being so indecisive. What are you going for here? Some kind of indecisive and *camp* aesthetic now? Strike a bold shape here. Go art or go home.
Zh: 别这么犹豫不决。你来这儿是干什么的？参加优柔寡断的*审美*夏令营吗？这里要大胆一点。不搞艺术，就回家去吧。

En: Bravo! Continue, then, in the mediocre and vulgar epigones of the world. So what if everything is incomprehensibly shit and you can see it. Take no responsibility.
Zh: 太赞了！那就继续，在充满平庸又粗俗的追随者的世界。所以，如果一切都是让人费解的狗屁，而你也能看见。完全不要负责。

En: This was a good call. That guy probably thinks forensics is autism too.
Zh: 这是个好主意。那个家伙可能也会觉得辩论术是臆想了。

En: Wait, what about music? Is it art?
Zh: 等等，那音乐呢？也是艺术吗？

En: Only the most experimental kind.
Zh: 只有最实验性的那一类是。

En: That's stupid. Architecture is stupid. Music is stupid.
Zh: 愚蠢。建筑学很愚蠢，音乐也愚蠢。

En: Why does art inspire you so much?
Zh: 为什么艺术能带给你这么多灵感？

En: It does, yes -- but what *is* art?
Zh: 确实是这样没错——但什么*是*艺术？

En: No, art is for arrogant blowhards. Why am I getting this?
Zh: 不，艺术是为那些傲慢的吹牛大家准备的。我为什么会想到这个？

En: Excellent question. Art is a diverse range of visual, literary, auditory, and performative creativity! It's an expression of imagination and technical skill. Additionally, it's history, criticism and pure enjoyment...
Zh: 这是个很好的问题。艺术是各种各样的视觉、文学、听觉和表述行为创造力的集合体！它是想象力和工艺技术的表达。此外，它还是历史，批判和纯粹的享受……

En: Is it? Yet your eye constantly seeks out the most critical side of any aesthetic confrontation. You follow the expressions of imagination and technical skill with curiosity...
Zh: 是吗？但你的眼睛还在不断寻找所有审美冲突中最有批判性的一面。你用好奇心追求着想象力和工艺技术的表达……

En: Yes! You seek substance. No vapid representations and reproductions of social mores, as made manifest in stuffy biennials, we're talking real *living art* here. Become the Art Cop. Half art critic -- half cop.
Zh: 是的！你在寻找物质。没有社会习俗那乏味的表示法和复制品——这一点在古板的二年生植物上表现地最明显，我们这里谈论的是真正的*生活艺术*。成为艺术警探吧。一半是艺术评论家——另一半是警察。

En: Have you looked in the mirror lately? To be honest, you have the exact features of the modern artist, with that wild hair and those clothes. Perhaps you should try to write poetry some day -- and critique architecture!
Zh: 你最近有没有照镜子？说真的，你拥有现代艺术家的所有特征，看看你疯狂的发型，还有衣服。也许有天你应该试试写诗——还有批判建筑学！

En: Have you looked in the mirror lately? You have the exact features of a savage art critic, with that beard and those clothes! Dishevelled and *prophetic*. Perhaps you should try to critique architecture too!
Zh: 你最近有没有照镜子？你拥有一个残酷艺术评论家的所有特征，看看那把胡子，还有那些衣服！蓬乱，而且有*预言感*。也许你还应该尝一下批判建筑学！

En: Of course not, it's autism. Box-drawing. Masturbation with a ruler and a sextant or whatever they use. You should demean and criticize the genteel institution of architecture. While extolling the virtues of the *pure* arts.
Zh: 当然不是了，这是自闭症。制表符。用尺子和六分仪或者其他什么东西自渎。你应该贬低和批判上层建筑。同时赞颂*纯粹*艺术的美德。

En: In short, art is the highest form of human communication -- representation, narrative, emotion and agency intertwined.
Zh: 总之，艺术是人类交流的最高形式——表现，叙述，情感还有错综复杂的代理关系。

En: Hold on, is architecture also art?
Zh: 等一下，建筑学也是艺术吗？

En: Would I fit into the art world? I mean...
Zh: 我能适应这个艺术世界吗？我的意思是……

En: I guess I *have* been feeling critical lately.
Zh: 我想自己最近好像*确实*很爱批评。

En: That's stupid. Architecture is stupid.
Zh: 愚蠢。建筑学太愚蠢了。

En: Such vigour! Already you express a sharp descriptive mind, ready to slice through the empty and superficial in favour of the *sublime* and the *beautiful*... Do it. Become the Art Cop. Half art critic -- half cop.
Zh: 这么有气势！你已经表现出尖锐的描述性思维，准备好切开这虚无又肤浅的表面，来支持*崇高*和*美丽*……来吧。成为艺术警探吧。一半是艺术评论家——另一半是警察。

En: Wow, so someone's been a little... *boring*?
Zh: 哇哦，这么说有人好像有一点……*无聊*？

En: No, I'm not. Get outta here! [Finish thought.]
Zh: 不，我不是。给我出去！[完成思维。]

En: What?
Zh: 什么？

En: Yes, my *standard* liege. Someone's seen all sorts of wild ideas pop off and thought -- 'I'll take the *boring* one. The regular, please. The brown.'
Zh: 遵命，吾之*贤君*。有人见过各种各样的疯狂思想匆匆离去，想着——“我就选*无聊*的这一个。普通的就好。棕色的。”

En: I like brown.
Zh: 我喜欢棕色。

En: I like standards.
Zh: 我喜欢标准。

En: Look, I'm just trying to do my job, no need for extravagance.
Zh: 你看，我只想完成自己的工作，没必要这么浮夸。

En: What is this? Picking on me for not being *crazy* enough? That's the LEAST of my concerns.
Zh: 这是干什么？因为我不够*疯狂*，所以要挑我的刺？我最不关心的就是这个了。

En: Kim. Am I boring?
Zh: “金。我很无聊吗？”

En: You? He looks at you. "I wouldn't worry about that."
Zh: “你？”他看着你。“我一点都不担心这个。”

En: See? You're so *regular* and vinyl-brown, he doesn't even want to talk to you about it.
Zh: 看见了吗？你如此*普通*，是黑棕色的，他甚至都不想跟你聊起这个。

En: Of course you do. And maybe some black shoes or a pristine white shirt to go with that. It's official: My lord's *copotype* is Regular Cop. I'll let everyone know. I'll send out a telefax.
Zh: 您当然是了。也许再来一双黑鞋，或者再搭配一件崭新的白衬衫。官方发言：吾之君主的*警察类型*是普通警察。吾会这一切告知天下。吾将派发一份传真。

En: Of course you do. Maybe some *regulations* and a *usual* pistol to go with them? It's official: My lord's *copotype* is Regular Cop. I'll let everyone know. I'll send out a telefax.
Zh: 您当然是了。也许再来点*规则*和一只*普通*的手枪来搭配？官方发言：吾之君主的*警察类型*是普通警察。吾会这一切告知天下。吾将派发一份传真。

En: Of course you do. Let's get right to it. My lord's *copotype* is Regular Cop. I'll let everyone know. I'll send out a telefax.
Zh: 您当然是了。让我们马上开始吧。吾之君主的*警察类型*是普通警察。吾会这一切告知天下。吾将派发一份传真。

En: Wait, wait -- this will be my *copotype* now?
Zh: 等等——现在这就是我的*警察类型*了？

En: Why not. Send out the telefax then. I'm not ashamed. (Opt in.)
Zh: 为什么不呢。那就派发传真吧。我不觉得有什么羞耻的。（接受思想。）

En: Yeah, no need. Let's keep that announcement on standby for now. (Opt out.)
Zh: 是啊，没必要。暂时让那份公告待定吧。（拒绝思想。）

En: Yes, the type of cop you are, sire. Think of it as a caste, a *class*, even. A nation of Regular Law Officials that you belong to. It comes, of course, with the *usual* benefits.
Zh: 没错，就是您那种警察，大人。把它想象成一个种姓，甚至是一种*阶层*。想象成您从属的普通执法人员的国度。当然，它也有*普通*的好处。

En: No need to be defensive. The regularity, the brownness, the *cut-and-dry* have their appeal -- a very *standard* appeal.
Zh: 没必要这么防备。规则性，褐色，还有*呆板*都拥有自己的诉求——非常*标准*的诉求。

En: Done and done. No actual *communiques* will be sent, of course. That would be too dramatic.
Zh: 搞定。当然了，不会发放实际的*公报*。要不然就太戏剧性了。

En: Good, good. Of course. To outright declare yourself something does seem a bit too... *interesting* now, doesn't it? I won't trouble you any further.
Zh: 很好，很好。当然了。直截了当地声明自己是个怎样的人，似乎有点……太*有趣*了，不是吗？吾辈以后不会再烦你了。

En: Son, you've really let yourself go -- it's a disgrace. But Coach Physical Instrument is going to get you back in prime condition. Even if it takes a million push-ups!
Zh: 孩子，你真的太放纵自己了——这是一种耻辱。但是强身健体教练要让你恢复最佳状态。就算是要做上100万个俯卧撑也得行！

En: Yes sir! Forge me into organic steel, coach!
Zh: 遵命，长官！把我锻造成有机钢铁吧，教练！

En: Does a master swordsman insult his own blade? No! I'm going to turn you into an athletic bench-mark, you big pussy!
Zh: 一个剑术大师会侮辱自己的宝剑吗？不会！我要把你变成身强体壮的基准点，你这只大弱鸡！

En: Wait, why piss?
Zh: 等等，为什么会有尿液？

En: Let's do this, coach, I'm with you! (Opt in.)
Zh: 我们来吧，教练，我跟你一起！（接受思想。）

En: Too much abuse for my taste. I'm more of an intellectual. (Opt out.)
Zh: 以我的口味来说，有点滥用了。我更像是知识分子派的。（拒绝思想。）

En: When a man sets his mind and body on something and gives his hundred and ten percent, he is sometimes going to piss himself. It just happens. No shame in that.
Zh: 当一个男人全身心专注于某件事情，而且付出了110%的努力，有时候就可能会尿裤子。它就这么发生了。没什么好羞愧的。

En: Attention, attention! An old has-been giving up! Come see the has-been quitting again, everyone!
Zh: 注意，注意！一个过气的老家伙要放弃了！大家快来看，这家伙又要退出了！

En: Behold, world -- here walks a sportsman, hands chalked and hair kept back with a bandana. The *homo athleticus!*.
Zh: 看啊，全世界的观众朋友们——一位运动员正朝我们走来，双手无光，一块鲜艳的大头巾将他的头发束在脑后。我们的*基佬运动员！*。

En: I'm really, *really* not interested. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 我真的，*真的*不感兴趣。[放弃思维。]

En: Coach Physical Instrument? Does that mean you'll call me a maggot and a nancy-boy to motivate me?
Zh: 强身健体教练？这是不是意味着你会用蛆虫和娘炮之类的称呼来激励我？

En: It's going to take blood, sweat, piss, and tears, but when I'm done with you, boy, you will be a Master Athlete!
Zh: 你需要付出鲜血、汗水、尿液还有眼泪，但是当我完成之后，小伙子，你会变成一个大师级运动员！

En: Vulnerabilities?
Zh: 弱点？

En: For the day you have to *fight* someone covered in the same material.
Zh: 有一天，你不得不跟穿着相同材质的人*战斗*。

En: As your head is ensconced in the ceramic helm, you realize --
Zh: 当你的脑袋隐藏在陶瓷头盔之下时，你意识到——

En: Well, it's a bit late to think about all this now, isn't it?
Zh: 呃，现在想这些有点迟了，对吧？

En: Better late than never, huh?
Zh: 迟到总比不到好，对吧？

En: I guess so.
Zh: 我猜也是。

En: It is good to be an unstoppable ceramic man.
Zh: 当一个无人能挡的陶瓷人，挺好的。

En: The hardened vitreous enamel, at once sleek and light, adds a glow to your cheeks and a spring to your step. Just imagine what a full suit of this stuff could do for you!
Zh: 硬化珐琅，光滑又轻盈，为你的面颊增添了一丝光彩，为你的步伐增加了一分轻盈。想象一下，如果穿上一整套，对你能有多大的帮助！

En: The white ceramic cuirass hugs your torso, shielding your vitals without adding much bulk to your form...
Zh: 白色的陶瓷胸甲环抱住你的躯干，保护你的命脉，同时也没有让你的体型变得过于臃肿……

En: You look down at the white ceramic sabatons hugging your arches and calves, surprised at how well they fit.
Zh: 你低头看向包裹在后背和小腿的白色陶瓷盔甲，惊讶地发现它们是如此地贴合。

En: As you fold your fingers into a fist, you realize you could knock anyone out with one punch... the white ceramic gloves wrap around your digits comfortably.
Zh: 当手指握拳，你意识到自己只需一拳就能击倒任何人……白色的陶瓷手套舒适地包裹着你的手指。

En: I remember a feeling -- being worried about crossing paths with someone in this armour.
Zh: 我记得一种感觉——担心与穿着这套盔甲的人相遇。

En: This is the long sought after *enemy technology*. I can't just enjoy it -- I must *study* it.
Zh: 这是我长久以来追寻的*敌人的技术*。我不能只是享受它——我必须*学习*它。

En: Yeah, I *want* the full suit!
Zh: 是啊，我*想要*一整套！

En: This gear could line my pockets with cash. I could probably sell it to some other cops.
Zh: 这个装备可以让我的口袋装满现金。也许我可以把它卖给其他警察。

En: Then you should prepare -- analyse this armour, figure out its vulnerabilities.
Zh: 然后你应该做好准备——分析这套盔甲，找出它的弱点。

En: Yes. You should analyse the armour, figure out its vulnerabilities.
Zh: 是的。你应该分析这套盔甲，找出它的弱点。

En: It may be a while before you have all the pieces. In the meantime, you should analyse the armour, figure out its vulnerabilities.
Zh: 你可能还需要一段时间才能集齐所有部件。与此同时，你应该分析这套盔甲，找出它的弱点。

En: Certainly, but you may want to hold on to the armour you have for long enough to properly analyse it, figure out its vulnerabilities.
Zh: 当然了，也许你想把这套盔甲尽可能久地留在身边，来争取足够的分析时间，找出它的弱点。

En: Remember, this is a highly specialized kinetic re-distributor meant to stop bullets. Wear it, observe its properties. See if there's a *weakness* in the design.
Zh: 记住，这是一个高度专业化的运动再分配器，专门用来挡子弹的。穿上它，观察它的性能。看看设计上有没有什么*弱点*。

En: Remember, the vitreous enamel material acts as a kinetic re-distributor. It's meant to stop bullets. Wear it, observe its properties. See if there's a *weakness* in the design.
Zh: 记住，这种珐琅材料充当着一种运动再分配器的角色。专门用来挡子弹的。穿上它，观察它的性能。看看设计上有没有什么*弱点*。

En: You really do feel more confident. Invulnerability does that. Even partial invulnerability.
Zh: 你真的感觉更加自信了。刀枪不入会产生这种效果。甚至局部的刀枪不入也可以。

En: Your movements cause tiny little clicks, like dice rolling somewhere far away, as the plates reorient to your motions.
Zh: 盔甲跟随你的动作而晃动，他们轻轻互相摩擦，声音就像有个骰子在远处滚动一样。

En: I will be responsible with this. This is just to protect me from harm, not to show off.
Zh: 我会对这个负责的。这只是为了保护我不受伤害，不是用来炫耀的。

En: Decked out in future-armour. Like a cop ought to be.
Zh: 穿着未来盔甲。这才是警察应有的样子。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: The hardened vitreous enamel, at once sleek and voluptuous, adds a glow to your cheeks and a spring to your step. Just imagine what a full suit of this stuff could do for you!
Zh: 硬化珐琅，光滑又轻盈，为你的面颊增添了一丝光彩，为你的步伐增加了一分轻盈。想象一下，如果穿上一整套，对你能有多大的帮助！

En: You really do feel more confident. Invulnerability does that. Even partial invulnerability.
Zh: 你真的感觉更加自信了。刀枪不入会产生这种效果。甚至局部的刀枪不入也可以。

En: Well, you found that one piece you were after, anyway. Don't forget to enjoy it!
Zh: 不管怎么说，你已经发现一件自己要找的东西了。别忘了享受一下！

En: One down -- two pieces to go. Here I come.
Zh: 找到一件——还有两件。我来了。

En: Two? Are you sure you're correct there? There was a helmet too. Three pieces more like. You were *ambitious*.
Zh: 两件？你确定没搞错吗？还有一个头盔呢。更像是三件套。你真是*野心勃勃*。

En: This is the long sought after *enemy technology*. I can't just enjoy it -- I must *study* it.
Zh: 这是我长久以来追寻的*敌人的技术*。我不能只是享受它——我必须*学习*它。

En: He did, yes he did. And you took it. Took it and put in in your pocket. Ka-ching, baby doll. Officer Hustle riding shotgun.
Zh: 他做了，是的，他做了。而且你拿了。拿走，而且放进了自己的口袋。哗啦，小宝贝。骗子警官就坐在副驾驶上。

En: Yeah, and Evrart gave me that fiver."
Zh: 是啊，而且艾弗拉特还给了我5块钱。

En: Wow, you work *hard*.
Zh: 哇哦，你工作可真够*努力*的。

En: I do?
Zh: 我有吗？

En: (Discard thought.)
Zh: （放弃思维。）

En: I know you're in a hurry, sir -- off to work really hard, as always -- I just need *one* moment of your time to discuss how hard you hustle.
Zh: 我知道你在赶时间，警官——努力工作，一如既往——我只需要占用你*一点*时间，讨论一下你有多努力。

En: Oh, yes. You hustle. You're a provider. It's tough out there, but you keep it real and provide...
Zh: 是啊，你很努力。你是个服务者。外面世道很艰难，但你能让它保持真实，不断提供你的服务……

En: I guess I do, yeah.
Zh: 我想是这样没错，嗯。

En: What hard work do I do exactly?
Zh: 我到底做了哪些努力？

En: Oh yeah! Like a horse. A work horse. For hard work.
Zh: 对啊！像一匹马，一匹役马。专门就是为努力工作而生的。

En: Look at yourself, you're a human pedometer! You must have walked 200,000 steps down cracked asphalt, mosaic, sand, and linoleum after you re-emerged.
Zh: 看看你自己，你就是个人形计步器！从你东山再起之后，一定已经走过了200,000步——走过那些破裂的沥青、地砖，沙土还有地板。

En: That is the sign of a hustler who never gives up. The world is harsh and people are evil -- you didn't make it that way. And you won't let it break you. You *ride*.
Zh: 这说明你是一个永不放弃的家伙。这个世界如此严酷，人类如此邪恶——你不是始作俑者，你也不会向它屈服。你会*一往无前*。

En: Yeah, I ride. A little.
Zh: 是啊，我是有那么点一往无前。

En: I fuckin' ride till I die, bitch.
Zh: 我他妈的会一直这样，直到我死的那一天。

En: I'm not sure I *ride*...
Zh: 我不确定自己是不是*一往无前*……

En: Oh, you do. You *make* money. You got gills, baby, meaning those black papers with the faces of the innocences on them. You bring in the Franconegros and the Solas.
Zh: 哦，你当然是了。你会*赚*钱。你有票子，宝贝，就是那些上面印着无罪之王面孔的黑纸。你收获了弗兰考格斯和索拉斯。

En: A little? You *make* money. You got gills, baby, got those black papers with the faces of the innocences on them. You bring in the Franconegros and the Solas.
Zh: 有一点？你会*造*钱。你有票子，宝贝，就是上面印着无罪之王面孔的黑纸。你收获了弗兰考格斯和索拉斯。

En: It ain't easy, but you *do* it. Day in and day out. You didn't make the rules but you won't lose! You're a cop and a sprinter and a money printer.
Zh: 其实没那么容易，但是你*做到*了，日复一日。规则不是你制定的，但是你也不会输！你是个警察，一个短跑健将，还是个金钱印刷机。

En: I mean yeah, I *did* take that bribe from that Joyce woman.
Zh: 我想说是啊，我*确实*从那个叫乔伊斯的女人那儿收受过贿赂。

En: I guess I've made *some* gills, sure.
Zh: 我想我确实赚了*一些*票子。

En: Can't say I didn't make that Siileng guy give some of his money either.
Zh: 也不能说我没有让那个叫席勒的家伙拿钱出来。

En: Sure, and I got that giant novelty cheque from Evrart...
Zh: 当然，而且我还从艾弗拉特那里拿到了一张兑奖支票……

En: Oh yeah, you took that bribe *hard*. You're a killa'.
Zh: 是啊，你那贿赂收的可真够*狠*的。你是个杀手。

En: Can't say that -- you *shook* him. You're a killer. A shark.
Zh: 也不能这么说——你*动摇*了他。你是个杀手，是一只鲨鱼。

En: Wasn't *easy* getting that giant novelty cheque from Evrart. Took some ingenuity to get into the harbour, but you got in -- and you *took* that bribe as hard as any cop's taken it.
Zh: 从艾弗拉特那里弄到兑奖支票也挺*不容易*的。费了那么大的劲才进入港口，但你还是进去了——而且像其他警察一样狠狠地*收受*了贿赂。

En: You could say I took some money from that Mañana guy too.
Zh: 你还可以说我从那个叫马列拉的家伙那里也拿了点钱。

En: You didn't log that in as a donation either -- you don't log any of that shit in, you're a straight rider.
Zh: 那个你也没有记录在捐款里——完全没有记录下来，你是个直肠子。

En: Sure, sure. And has it been easy? Is life easy? Have you *not* gone into cardiac arrest? Are you *not* about to have an anxiety attack or shoot yourself in the mouth? But you still hustle 24/7, ride or die. Now, ask yourself...
Zh: 当然，当然了。而且有那么容易吗？生活容易吗？你难道*没有*心跳骤停过吗？你*没有*过焦虑发作，或者想吞枪自杀过？但你还是7x24小时地拼命奔跑着。现在，问问你自己……

En: ...are you *rich*?
Zh: ……你很*富有*吗？

En: That's just what it's like -- life and death. But you got *gills* on your side, baby, got those black papers with the faces of the innocences on them -- you bring in the Franconegros and the Solas.
Zh: 就是这个样子——生活和死亡。但是有*票子*站在你这边，宝贝，你拥有那些印着无罪之王面孔的黑纸——你收获了弗兰考格斯和索拉斯。

En: Oh, and then there's pawning stuff off to that suspicious Roy guy.
Zh: 哦，还有把东西典当给那个叫罗伊的可疑的家伙。

En: Yeah, you're in the sales business. Shake 'em for shit and then pawn it off, *law officer*-style.
Zh: 是啊，你在做销售生意。把他们吓得屁滚尿流，然后把东西典当掉，很有*执法人员*的风范。

En: Yes. Quite.
Zh: 是的，的确如此。

En: No, I'm actually *not*.
Zh: 不，其实我*不富有*。

En: Get outta here! You're a pauper! You work harder than *anyone*, almost rode yourself to the grave and you're still practically a *hobo* -- why is that?
Zh: 少来！你是个穷光蛋！你比*任何人*工作都要努力，甚至已经快把自己送进坟墓，结果几乎还是个*流浪汉*——为什么会这样？

En: That's right. You work harder than *anyone*, you almost rode yourself to the grave and you're still practically a *hobo* -- why is that?
Zh: 没错。你比*任何人*工作都要努力，甚至已经快把自己送进坟墓，结果几乎还是个*流浪汉*——为什么会这样？

En: It's because of that Garte guy riding my ass!
Zh: 是因为那个叫加尔特的家伙一直在骚扰我！

En: The system is broken!
Zh: 体制被破坏了！

En: There's a market for corrupt cops out there, but the immigrant cops have price dumped it.
Zh: 腐败的警察在外面有市场，但是移民警察把价格拉低了。

En: I don't know. Why *am* I so poor?
Zh: 我不知道。为什么我*会*这么穷？

En: Boohoo, *the system is broken*. *The establishment is keeping me down...* That's not the fuck-yeah attitude you're used to, what is this? Why are you so poor?
Zh: 你就哭吧，*体制被破坏*了！*体制让我失望*……这可不是你习惯的那种‘是又怎么样，去他妈的’的态度，这是什么？你为什么这么穷？

En: Look, the immigrants are cool. The immigrants play *cool* music. Everyone likes them. Especially the women. Don't hate on the immigrants. They've got nothing to do with you living under a boat.
Zh: 你看，移民其实挺酷的。移民的音乐很*酷*。所有人都喜欢他们，特别是女人。不要仇恨移民，他们跟你穷困潦倒的事实没有任何关联。

En: The Garte-man has set himself up one of those self replicating money-structures. You should *learn* from it. Don't play the victim. Think, hustler. Think with your head.
Zh: 那个叫加尔特的男人自己设置了一套能够自我复制的赚钱方法。你应该从中*学习*一下。别总是扮演受害者。要懂得思考，大忙人。好好用用你的脑子。

En: Because of the TAXES. G-man's got his jam-covered sticky-fingers in your pocket, stealing from you every time you buy, sell, walk, talk, fart, so much as sneeze!
Zh: 因为税收。那家伙把他那沾满果酱、黏黏糊糊的手指伸进你的口袋里，每当你买东西，卖东西，走路，说话，放屁，甚至是打喷嚏的时候，都在偷你的钱！

En: That's right! One-hundred percent. Fucking G-man's got his jam-covered sticky-fingers in your pocket, stealing from you every time you buy, sell, walk, talk, fart, so much as sneeze!
Zh: 没错！100%准确。那家伙把他那沾满果酱、黏黏糊糊的手指伸进你的口袋里，每当你买东西、卖东西、走路、说话、放屁，甚至是打喷嚏的时候，它都在偷你的钱！

En: Fucking taxes, man.
Zh: 税收真他妈该死，兄弟。

En: What are you not sure about?! They're *milking* your nipples till they bleed. Can't you see? Aren't you *sick and tired* of having bloody nipples?
Zh: 你还有什么不确定的？！他们一直从你身上*挤奶*，直到你的乳头出血为止。你难道看不见吗？难道流血的乳头没让你觉得*十分厌烦*吗？

En: Aren't taxes almost non-existent in the Gossamer State that is Revachol?
Zh: 像瑞瓦肖这种小国，税收不是几乎不存在吗？

En: I thought there *were* no taxes.
Zh: 我还以为根本*没有*税收呢。

En: Really? Every time I sneeze?
Zh: 真的吗？每次我打喷嚏的时候都会吗？

En: You and I both, but they got those *indirect modes of taxation*. Sales tax, excise duty, extraction tax, this tax that doesn't even have a name -- plus there's the stuff *people in other countries* pay for, that makes them ask for more money from *you* here! The Gossamer State's a myth. In total the Coalition Government is taking...
Zh: 你和我都是这么想的，但是他们拥有那些*间接征税模式*。营业税、消费税、提取税、甚至还有连名字都没有的税——外加上*其他国家的人*会支付的税，会从*你*这里要求更多的钱！蛛丝国度不过是个神话。总的来说，联盟政府会收取的总额度是……

En: NINETY-EIGHT PERCENT OF ALL YOUR MONEY.
Zh: 你所有财产的98%。

En: Every time you wipe your ass! They got their direct and their *indirect modes of taxation*: sales tax, excise duty, extraction tax, alimony, one tax that doesn't even have a name! Plus there's the stuff *people in other countries* pay for, that makes them ask for more money from *you* here. Total tax duties add up to...
Zh: 每次你擦屁股的时候也一样！他们有直接的，也有*间接收税模式*：营业税、消费税、提取税、甚至还有连名字都没有的税——外加上*其他国家的人*会支付的税，会从*你*这里要求更多的钱！总的税金加起来有……

En: NO FUCKING WAY. I guess I'm a free market fundamentalist now. (Opt in.)
Zh: 绝对他妈的没门。我猜现在我是个自由市场原教旨主义者了。（接受思想。）

En: Are you sure? That seems like a pretty big number...
Zh: 你确定吗？这个数字看起来好像有点大……

En: This isn't helping me solve my money problem, it's only making me into a free-market type. (Opt out.)
Zh: 这样也不能帮我解决金钱问题，只会让我变成自由市场那种家伙。（拒绝思想。）

En: Here you go, hustler, fight the righteous fight! Free the people. Keep it real. Keep it street. Keep foaming at the mouth *furiously* on the tax issue!
Zh: 就是这样，大忙人，为了公平和正义战斗吧！解放人民！保持真实。忠于竞赛。继续*猛烈地*唾弃税收问题吧！

En: Bleeding nipples are kind of a pain, but how will deregulation help with that? (Opt in, but only a little.)
Zh: 流血的乳头好像有点痛，但是放松管制对那个又有什么帮助呢？（接受思想，但只有一点。）

En: It's *all* about the tax issue, hustler. No other problem in the world is as pressing as top-marginal tax rates, and don't you fucking forget it.
Zh: 这*全都*跟税收问题有关，大忙人。世界上的其他问题都没有最高边际税率来的紧迫，你可别他妈的忘了这一点。

En: What are you, a racist? Don't be a racist! Be a cool immigrant ultraliberal free market advocate! Ride or die, keep it street!
Zh: 你是谁，种族主义者吗？别搞种族主义！做一个移民极端自由市场的拥护者多酷炫啊！展现你的忠诚，忠于竞赛！

En: Well... if *not* being an ultraliberal makes me a racist then I guess I should be an ultraliberal? (Opt in.)
Zh: 呃……如果*不*推崇极端自由主义会让我变一个种族主义者的话，那我猜我应该加入？（接受思想。）

En: Go away! [Discard thought.]
Zh: 走开！[放弃思维。]

En: Here you go, hustler, fight the righteous fight! Free the people. Keep it real. Keep it street. Keep foaming at the mouth *furiously* on the tax issue!
Zh: 就是这样，大忙人，为了公平和正义战斗吧！解放人民！保持真实。保持街头。继续往*猛烈地*唾弃税收问题吧！

En: This guy's appropriating the emerging Boogie Street lingo as part of his sales pitch for the free market economy.
Zh: 这家伙把新兴的布吉街术语变成了推销自由市场经济说辞的一部分。

En: You're trying to sound like a Boogie Street youth to peddle me this stuff, aren't you?
Zh: 你是想让自己听起来像个布吉街的年轻人，然后向我散播这些东西，是不是？

En: Yeah, ain't it cool, rider?! Ain't it street?
Zh: 是啊，难道你不觉得很酷吗，骑手？！难道不觉得很街头风吗？

En: It's not. (Opt out.)
Zh: 并没有。（拒绝思想。）

En: My honour is my life. It's what separates me from the treacherous wömen.
Zh: 我的荣耀就是我的生命。它将我和那些奸诈的女人区分开来。

En: Okay...
Zh: 好吧……

En: I don't want this. I really don't care about honour... at all.
Zh: 我不想要这个。我真的不在乎什么荣誉……一点也不。

En: No! You're not a snivelling shit-heel chasing imaginary karma-coupons! Not for this, nor the afterlife! Fuck this honour shit!
Zh: 不！你不是一个哭哭啼啼追赶虚构的因果优惠券的傻瓜！不是为了这个，也不是为了来世！让荣誉什么的去死吧！

En: Ah... ahhh. You continue to display such humility. This is to be admired! Refusing praise for your personal integrity is most honourable indeed.
Zh: 啊……哈。你还是表现出了如此的谦逊。这是很值得钦佩的！拒绝对自己正直的赞美，确实是最让人尊敬的。

En: You brought much shame on your family today. Your name will forever be tarnished by this most shameful of deeds. Be forever banished, Shameful One!
Zh: 今天你给自己的家人带去了很多耻辱。你的名字将会永远被这最可耻的行为玷污。被永远地放逐吧，可耻的人！

En: Good. You feel its presence. Now you are ready for the *Rite of Honour*.
Zh: 很好。你感到了它的存在。现在你已经准备好迎接*荣誉仪式*了。

En: Honourable One, you have accumulated a substantial amount of honour points on your life-path. You are a man most virtuous.
Zh: 荣耀的人啊，你已经在人生道路上积累了大量的荣誉点。你是最善良正直的人。

En: Go forth and commit even more honourable deeds. And should your resolve ever waiver, remember The Rite of Honour. It will always cleanse a man's soul...
Zh: 向前去，做出更加荣耀的举动吧。如果你决定放弃，请记住这个荣誉仪式。它能一直净化人类的灵魂……

En: You're not hearing me. I'm not some creepy honour-lover. Period.
Zh: 你没听我说话。我不是什么诡异的荣誉爱好者。句号。

En: This honour thing feels overwhelming. Maybe I should open my heart to it?
Zh: 这个荣誉什么的东西感觉有点势不可挡。也许我应该向它敞开心扉？

En: Wait, there were honour points?
Zh: 等等，还有荣誉点的吗？

En: My honour is my life.
Zh: 我的人生就是我的荣耀。

En: Isn't honour sort of an archaic concept?
Zh: 这个荣耀不是某种陈旧的观念吗？

En: Of course there were honour points. Did you think no one was paying attention to all of your honourable deeds, Honourable One?
Zh: 当然有荣誉点了。你觉得没人注意到你那些值得尊敬的举动吗，荣耀的人啊？

En: Living in the name of virtue and doing noble deeds while expecting nothing in return is not *archaic*. How can you even think that?
Zh: 以美德的名字为生，做着高尚的举动，同时不期待任何回报，这一点也不*陈旧*。你为什么会这样想？

En: Selflessness forms the basis for the warrior code. An ageless code, as fit for nomadic Iilmaraan tribes traversing the vast Red Plateau in Provincia Gurdi as it is for your neighbourhood postman.
Zh: 无私是战士法典的基础。一部不朽的法典，它适合穿越戈迪省广阔红色高原的伊尔玛游牧部落，就像适合你邻居的邮差一样。

En: Yes. Your deeds have spoken for you, Honourable One, but to fully drape one's self in an eternal cloak of honour a ritual must be completed. A *Rite of Honour*...
Zh: 是的。你的举动代表了你，荣耀的人啊，但是要想把一个人完全包裹在永恒的荣耀斗篷之下，还必须举行一个仪式。一个*荣耀仪式*……

En: I only try my best. It's the most any of us can do.
Zh: 我只是尽力而为。我们大部分人都是这么做的。

En: Oh, the modesty on this one. Another 10 honour points for you, sir!
Zh: 哦，你真是太谦逊了。再为你加上10个荣耀点，先生！

En: A warrior code, you say... I do feel like a warrior. This whole thing is beginning to sound very *me*.
Zh: 你说，一部战士法典……我确实觉得自己是个战士。这整件事情听起来有点越来越像*我*了。

En: It sounds rather arrogant, a secretive self-regard.
Zh: 听起来很傲慢，一种秘密的自尊感。

En: No, no, no! You see, you're putting the needs of *others* above *yours*. *You* get nothing in return -- not even praise. You always get the short, *noble* end of the stick...
Zh: 不不不！你看，你把*其他人*的需求放在了*自己*的需求之上。*你*没有得到任何回报——甚至连赞扬都没有。你总是得到棍子上比较短，比较*高尚*的那一端……

En: Don't think about it too much! Just say it -- are you ready to get knee-deep in honour?
Zh: 别想太多了！就直接说吧——你准备好沉浸在荣耀之中了吗？

En: Hold your horses! This is a mistake. Honour is meaningless to me. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 别着急！这是个错误。荣耀对我来说毫无意义。[放弃思维。]

En: You are on the fast track to becoming one of the rarest, most revered of all police officers -- an honour cop.
Zh: 你已经踏上最罕见、最可敬那类警察的快车道上——一名光荣的警察。

En: Most dishonourable are those who have known honour, carried honour in their hearts, and then disowned honour. They are the *honourfallen*...
Zh: 最无耻的都是那些知道荣誉，把荣誉放在心中，然后否认荣誉的人。他们是*堕落*的荣耀之徒……

En: Even among the honourable only the most dignified are deemed worthy -- but you, oh honourable one, have excelled... in honour.
Zh: 就算在那些荣耀的人中间，也只有最高贵的那一个才是当之无愧的——但是你，哦，荣耀的人啊，已经超越……荣誉了。

En: Honour comes from deep within you and to truly know oneself, to *know* one's honour, one must reach deep within oneself and *touch* one's honour...
Zh: 荣耀源于你的内心深处，为了真正了解自己，*了解*一个人的荣耀，你必须直达深处，去*碰触*那份荣耀……

En: You need to bring the thumb of your right hand -- your sword hand -- to your rectum and stick it in there to form the Arch of Honours.
Zh: 你需要用右手拇指——持剑的那只手——放进直肠，把它伸进去，形成荣耀的拱门。

En: All I ever wanted was to live with dignity -- to die with honour. (Stick your thumb in your ass.)
Zh: 我想要的只是过上有尊严的生活——带着荣耀死去。（把拇指伸入你的直肠。）

En: You're crazy if you think I'm just going to stick a finger in my ass! NO WAY!
Zh: 你疯了吗，居然以为我会把手指头塞进我的菊部！想都别想！

En: What? I don't know... just like that? Outside? What about people?
Zh: 什么？我不知道……那样就行了？在外面吗？这么多人怎么弄？

En: What? What if someone comes and *sees* me?
Zh: 什么？要是有人经过，*看见*我了怎么办？

En: People will be in awe, admiring a police officer most honourable in a sacred ritual of uttermost righteousness.
Zh: 人们会敬畏地欣赏那位最荣耀的警官举行一场最公正的神圣仪式。

En: Then they will witness honour so great it seems nigh impossible a single man can contain it. They will admire you, Honourable One.
Zh: 那他们会亲眼见证这份伟大的荣耀，伟大到任何人几乎都无法承受。他们会钦佩你的，荣耀的人啊。

En: WHAT ARE YOU DOING?! The lieutenant jumps away from you.
Zh: “你在做什么？”警督从你身边跳开。

En: Congratulations, Honourable One! You have become a member of a noble faculty. A man kneels, an Honour Cop rises...
Zh: 恭喜，荣耀的人啊！你已经成为高贵学院的一员。一个男人跪下去，另一个荣耀的警察站起来……

En: I am honouring myself, lieutenant.
Zh: “我在为自己带去荣耀，警督。”

En: Nothing, you wouldn't understand. It's an honour thing.
Zh: “没什么，你不会理解的。这是一件很荣耀的事情。”

En: Who, me? Nothing. I'm doing nothing, Kim.
Zh: “谁，我吗？没什么。我什么也没做，金。”

En: Scratching my ass. What's the big deal?
Zh: “摸一下我的屁股。有什么大不了的吗？”

En: The big deal? The lieutenant rolls his eyes. "I guess we really do come from different upbringings..."
Zh: “大不了？”警督翻了翻白眼。“看来我们的成长环境真是截然不同……”

En: Good. That was a lie most honourable. Sometimes we must hide the truth from those who wouldn't understand it. The Less-Honoured Ones.
Zh: 很好。这是一个最荣耀的谎言。有时候我们必须对那些不理解的人隐藏真相。那些不荣耀的人。

En: It is an honour to serve with you, Honour Cop!
Zh: 和你一起服役是我的荣耀，荣耀警察！

En: Then why are you elbow deep in your pants like... He suddenly stops as if realizing he doesn't want to hear the answer. "Never mind, officer. Carry on."
Zh: “那你为什么要那样深入……”他突然停了下来，似乎意识到自己不想听到答案。“没事了，警官。继续吧。”

En: Really? It seems more like a personal hygiene thing. He leans even more away from you. "But let's not delve deeper."
Zh: “真的吗？那更像是个人卫生问题。”他离得你更远了。“不过我们还是别再深入探究这个话题了。”

En: You're right. The lieutenant, although a noble man, does not understand honour like you do. Best not to waste time trying to explain. Lead by example.
Zh: 你是对的。警督他虽然是个高尚的人，但也不能理解你的那种荣耀。最好还是不要浪费时间去解释了。以身作则吧。

En: I can see that, but do you have to do it where everyone can see you? He looks shocked.
Zh: “我能看见，但你真的有必要在每个人都能看见你的地方这样做吗？”他看起来很震惊。

En: Have you no self control? Then realizing the naivete of the question he looks at the ground. "Please spare me this sight."
Zh: “你完全不懂什么叫自控力吗？”他突然意识到这个问题有多天真，于是低头看向地面。“别让我看到这个了。”

En: Well... uh... don't! The lieutenant looks truly shocked.
Zh: “呃……不……别！”警督看起来真心惊呆了。

En: The lieutenant is a noble man, but he does not *know* honour like you and I do. Best not to waste time trying to explain. Lead by example.
Zh: 警督是个高尚的人，但他不*知道*我和你的那种荣耀。最好还是不要浪费时间去解释了。以身作则吧。

En: Mhmh-mhmh, you are like a wondering knight-monk setting right the wrongs of the world you come upon.
Zh: 嗯嗯，你就像一个好奇的骑士武僧，纠正着你在这个世界上遇到的错误。

En: Are you ready to drink deep from the cup of honour?
Zh: 你准备好豪饮荣耀圣杯中的美酒了吗？

En: Meaningless?! Vulgar knave, how dare you besmirch the honour of honour points... It hurts the eyes to look upon filth like you. Begone.
Zh: 没有意义？！粗俗的无赖，你居然敢诽谤光荣的荣耀点……看着你这样的污秽简直就是伤眼睛。快走开。

En: This is because I keep saying *none of the above* to political stuff, isn't it?"
Zh: 这是因为我一直对政治之类的玩意说些*以上都不对*的话，对吗？

En: It's *also* about that. But it's *also* more! Perhaps it's the hangover, perhaps it's a temporary surge of serotonin, but something tells you...
Zh: *也*是那样没错。但是*还*远远不止这些！也许是宿醉，也许是暂时的血清素飙升，不过某种东西告诉你……

En: What's this? We're getting reports of *normal*, *reasonable*, *temperate* political opinions somewhere in Martinaise...
Zh: 这是什么？我们收到报告说马丁内斯某处传来*普通的*，*合理的*，*稳健的*政治意见……

En: You must be mistaken: I'm a real radical.
Zh: 你一定是搞错了：我是个真正的种族主义者。

En: That's me, Mr. Reasonable. Someone's got to keep it sane around here.
Zh: 那就是我，公道先生。这里总得有人保持清醒吧。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Of course, a *radical centrist*. In these bright and loud times where a thousand frequencies drown one another out, sober thinking is a radical act...
Zh: 当然，一个*激进的中间派*。在这些明亮而又喧嚣的时代，数千个频率彼此淹没，冷静思考本身就是激进的行为……

En: The air suddenly feels calmer. More transparent in a strangely tender way. Perhaps it's the hangover, perhaps it's a temporary surge of serotonin, but something tells you...
Zh: 空气突然变得更加平静。以一种奇妙又温柔的方式，变得愈加透明。也许是因为宿醉，也许是暂时的血清素飙升，但是有什么告诉你……

En: It's time... to become a citizen of the *Kingdom of Conscience*.
Zh: 时间到了……成为*道德国度*的子民吧。

En: First, where is this Kingdom of Conscience?
Zh: 首先，这个道德国度在哪？

En: No more talk -- Sign me up for a passport! (Opt in.)
Zh: 不用多说了——马上给我注册本护照吧！（接受思想。）

En: No, I'm too fiery for this watercolour ideology. I'm trying to develop more *extreme* and *interesting* opinions... (Opt out.)
Zh: 不，我太暴躁了，不适合这个水彩色的意识形态。我要尝试开发更加*极端*和*有趣*的选项……（拒绝思想。）

En: It is not a place, it is a *moment* in time that can only arise in the right circumstances. In all of human history, it's only been achieved a handful of times...
Zh: 它不是个地方，是时间里的某个*时刻*，只有在正确的环境下才能出现。在整个人类历史当中，它成功出现的次数也是屈指可数的……

En: I knew we could trust you. Remember -- *real democracy* is just around the corner for Revachol. When that real democracy kicks in we are all going to be so much happier.
Zh: 我知道我们可以信任你。记住——*真正的民主*就快要降临瑞瓦肖。当真正的民主到来时，我们都会变得更加开心。

En: That's a pity. *Real democracy* was just around the corner for Revachol. All the leading citizens are waiting there -- without you.
Zh: 真可惜。*真正的民主*就快要降临瑞瓦肖。所有市民都将翘首以待——而你却不在其中。

En: Must have been a false alarm, then.
Zh: 那就肯定是个假警报了。

En: There you have it. Sometimes holding the line *is* progress.
Zh: 好了。有时候坚持下去*就是*进步。

En: Speaking of, when are you going to get on that, bub?
Zh: 说到这里，你打算什么时候开始，小家伙？

En: Oh, right. Then let's get there... eventually?
Zh: 哦，对哦。那我们就……最后去那里吧？

En: How do you bring about those *circumstances*?
Zh: 该怎么创造那些*环境*？

En: Sometimes, in the face of great disaster, defending the status quo *is* progress.
Zh: 有时候，在面对巨大的灾难前，维持现状*就是*进步。

En: That's a stupid goal. (Shake your head dismissively.)
Zh: 这是个愚蠢的目标。（轻蔑地摇摇头。）

En: Then you've never lived through *real* chaos...
Zh: 那你其实从未经历过*真正的*混乱……

En: That's an honourable goal. (Nod your head approvingly.)
Zh: 这是一个很光荣的目标。（赞许地点点头。）

En: *Incrementally*.
Zh: *循序渐进*。

En: Yes.
Zh: 是的。

En: Is it?
Zh: “是吗？”

En: History's greatest catastrophes have been brought about by people trying to make the world a better place *too quickly*...
Zh: 历史上最大的灾难早已降临，就在人们*过快地*打算把这个世界变得更好的时候……

En: It is, isn't it?
Zh: “就是这样，难道不是吗？”

En: No.
Zh: 不。

En: What a fucking joke!
Zh: 开什么他妈的玩笑！

En: YAWN. You'd get there faster with a little *speed*.
Zh: 哈欠。来一点*思必得*的话，就能最快到达。

En: Do you believe the status quo is preferable to chaos and bloodshed?
Zh: 你认为维持现状会比混乱和杀戮好吗？

En: *Tsk, tsk*. Just because you live in the *present* doesn't mean you have the right to place your needs above the needs of the *future*...
Zh: *啧啧，啧啧*。只是因为你生活在*当下*，不代表你有权把自己的需求放在*未来*的需求之上……

En: It's also post-industrial, post-ideological, and even *post-sexual*.
Zh: 它也是后工业化，后意识形态，甚至是*后两性文化*的。

En: What sangfroid...
Zh: 多么沉着……

En: But what about all the things that are wrong *now*?
Zh: 但是*现在*那些所有错误的事情呢？

En: What benevolence...
Zh: 多么仁慈……

En: You may never live to see the Kingdom of Conscience. Your children may not. Even your *grandchildren* might not. But that's no excuse not to keep working...
Zh: 你永远无法活到亲眼看见道德国度的那一天。你的孩子也许不行，甚至你的*孙辈*也不行。但这不是不继续工作的借口……

En: Partly because humanity will need to discard many of the categories that define and limit it today. The Kingdom of Conscience is post-capitalist, post-national...
Zh: 部分是因为人类今天需要抛弃很多定义和限制它的类别。道德国度是后资本主义，后国家化的……

En: That's the genius of *Dolores Dei*. She recognized that progress is meaningless if its gains are lost because of instability. *Real*, lasting change can only come about gradually. Increment by increment.
Zh: 那就是*德洛莉丝·黛*的天才之处。她意识到如果因为不稳定而失去进步的成果，那进步本身则是毫无意义的。*真正的*，持久的改变只会渐渐产生。循序渐进。

En: Sounds incredible. Allons-y! Let's go there right now. (Opt in.)
Zh: 听起来有点难以置信！我们走！现在就去吧！（接受思想。）

En: Okay, but what's the Kingdom of Conscience actually *like*?
Zh: 好吧，但是这个道德国度到底是*什么样*的呢？

En: What you *want* is immaterial. The Kingdom of Conscience is coming... WHETHER YOU LIKE IT OR NOT. (Only very slowly.)
Zh: 你*想要*的东西是无形的。道德国度即将降临……不论你喜欢与否。（只不过特别慢。）

En: Man, that sounds kind of terrible. I don't think I want to be a moralist anymore. (Opt out.)
Zh: 我的天，听起来好像有点吓人。我想我还是不要当什么道德卫士了。（拒绝思想。）

En: The Kingdom is difficult to comprehend and even more difficult to describe...
Zh: 这个国度很难理解，更难描述……

En: Slow down, Mr. Reasonable! Did you miss the part about compromising and taking things slow?
Zh: 慢一点，公道先生！你想念妥协和放慢脚步那部分吗？

En: This sounds mega boring. Count me out. (Opt out.)
Zh: 听起来超级无聊的。别算上我。（拒绝思想。）

En: Wait, is the Kingdom of Conscience really about doing things, or just preserving the status quo?
Zh: 等等，这个道德国度真是关于做事的吗，或者只是维持现状？

En: That seems fine. I still want to live for the present, though. (Opt out.)
Zh: 听起来好像还可以。不过我想生活在当下。（拒绝思想。）

En: What rationality...
Zh: 多么理性……

En: That's right. Remember -- *real democracy* is just around the corner for Revachol. When that real democracy kicks in -- a long time from now -- we are all going to be so much happier.
Zh: 记住——*真正的民主*就快要降临瑞瓦肖。当真正的民主到来时——从现在开始的很久之后——我们都会变得更加开心。

En: Hear that? Magnesium. That's what you're lacking. The lack of magnesium has you slouched.
Zh: 听见了吗？镁。那是你缺少的东西。缺少镁会让你变得没精打采。

En: The magnesium levels in your blood are dangerously low. It's about the low magnesium levels and *not* the high alcohol levels.
Zh: 你血液里面的镁含量已经低到一个很危险的水平。这里说的是低镁含量，*不是*高酒精含量。

En: I fucking knew it wasn't the alcohol... or the other things.
Zh: 我他妈当然知道不是酒精……或者其他什么东西了。

En: So there's a lack of magnesium in me?
Zh: 所以我的身体里缺镁吗？

En: My magnesium level is fine. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 我身体的镁含量挺好的。[放弃思维。]

En: Yeah, the other things! Long live the other things! Made you strong as an ox, they have.
Zh: 是啊，其他东西！其他东西万岁！它们让你变得强壮如牛。

En: Yes, and it's critical. Look at yourself. You're practically devolving into a fish due to the lack of magnesium in you bloodstream.
Zh: 是的，而且是至关重要的。看看你自己。因为血液里缺少镁，你几乎就快退化成一条咸鱼了。

En: I need to Mag it up?
Zh: 我需要再多*镁*一点？

En: So I need to Mag it sideways?
Zh: 所以我要再稍微来点*镁*？

En: You need to get *SO* magged up! You've probably had two heart attacks and a minor stroke already... and the only prescription is insane amounts of magnesium.
Zh: 你真的*太需要*多镁一点了！你很可能已经心脏病发两次，还有一次轻度中风……唯一的处方就是加入疯狂剂量的镁。

En: One stroke? Don't be so modest. He's having one right now.
Zh: 一次中风？别谦虚了。他现在就已经中风了。

En: Mag it sideways? What are you talking about?! You need to Mag it *up*! You've probably had two heart attacks and a minor stroke already... and the only prescription is insane amounts of magnesium.
Zh: 稍微来点*镁*？你在说什么呢？！你需要*多加*一点镁！你很可能已经心脏病发两次，还有一次轻度中风……唯一的处方就是加入疯狂剂量的镁。

En: You're saying... I need to become a Magnesium-Based Lifeform?
Zh: 你是说……我需要变成一个以镁过活的生命体？

En: I need is to stop thinking about this. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 我不能再想这个。[放弃思维。]

En: Yes. If you want to live, you need to *evolve*. You need to transcend the carbon barrier. Go to the apothecary and buy insane amounts of magnesium -- it will reverse the damage to your circulatory system.
Zh: 是的。如果你想活下去，就需要*进化*。你需要跨越碳的壁垒。马上去找药剂师，买下疯狂剂量的镁——它会逆转你损坏的循环系统。

En: Just remember -- it's not the alcohol. Buy more of that too. Alcohol is *not* the problem.
Zh: 只要记住——它不是酒精。但酒精也要多买一点，因为酒精*不是*问题。

En: And it's certainly not the dextroamphetamine.
Zh: 而且肯定也不是右旋安非他命。

En: Nor pyrholidon, that sweet, sweet psychoactive radiation drug.
Zh: 也不是吡嚯浣酮，那个甜美又迷人的精神辐射药品。

En: Nor smoking for forty years. It's the lack of magnesium. And excess of coffee. You should stop drinking coffee. It wreaks havoc on your gastrointestinal system.
Zh: 也不是抽了40年的烟。就是缺镁。还有过量饮用咖啡。你不能再喝咖啡了。它会严重破坏你的消化系统。

En: Do you *feel* that?
Zh: 你*感觉*到了吗？

En: Yes.
Zh: 是的。

En: Feel what?
Zh: 感觉到什么？

En: Of course you do. You don't even know *what* it is you're feeling, but you can feel it. That's the mark of a true *Remote Viewer*...
Zh: 你当然可以。你甚至不知道自己感觉到的是*什么*，但就是能感觉到。这就是一个真正的*遥视者*的标志……

En: Close your eyes. Reach out with your *feelings*. There's something *para-natural* at play here.
Zh: 闭上你的眼睛。伸出你*感觉*的触手。这里有一种*超自然*的东西在起作用。

En: NONSENSE.
Zh: 胡说。

En: Now, the time has come for you to be inducted into the ranks of the Remote Viewers Division.
Zh: 现在，你应该被引荐到遥视者部队去工作。

En: Close your eyes.
Zh: 闭上你的眼睛。

En: I'm good where I am. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 我现在这样就很好。[放弃思维。]

En: You're right. I feel it now.
Zh: 你是对的。我现在能感觉到。

En: This sounds like a load of garbage. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 听起来像是一堆垃圾。[放弃思维。]

En: The time has come to *connect* to RVD HQ. By establishing a connection you'll have proved yourself worthy as a Remote Viewer...
Zh: 是时候*联系*遥视者总部了。如果能建立起连接，你将证明自己是个合格的遥视者……

En: Everything alright, detective?
Zh: “你没事吧，警探？”

En: Shhh... I'm trying to connect with the Remote Viewers Division.
Zh: “嘘……我在试着联系遥视者部队。”

En: Yeah, just resting my eyes. [Discard thought.]
Zh: “是啊，只是休息一下眼睛。”[放弃思维。]

En: It has been a long day. The lieutenant looks down at his wristwatch.
Zh: “今天是挺漫长的。”警督低头看了看自己的手表。

En: It is rather late. The lieutenant looks down at his wristwatch.
Zh: “已经很晚了。”警督低头看了看自己的手表。

En: A little early in the day for a nap, isn't it? The lieutenant frowns at his wristwatch.
Zh: “现在打盹是不是太早了点？”警督看着手表皱了皱眉。

En: This again? Come on, detective. The joke has gone on long enough.
Zh: “又来这个？拜托，警探。这个玩笑已经开的太久了。”

En: Ignore the lieutenant. He's never connected with anything para-natural. You're on different planes, metaphysically speaking.
Zh: 无视警督。他从来没有跟任何超自然的东西联系过。从形而上学地意义上讲，你生活在一个不同的星球。

En: Keep your eyes shut.
Zh: 闭上你的眼睛。

En: Open your eyes. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 睁开你的眼睛。[放弃思维。]

En: It takes time to block out the sounds of the world. But once you do, it's like you're on a wavelength. Not like any *natural* wavelength. No. There seems to be *something* on the other end, if only you could listen closely enough...
Zh: 阻挡这个世界的声音需要花上一点时间。但是一旦做到了，你就会像处在一个波长之上。不像任何*自然*的波长。不是的。如果你能足够靠近去倾听，会发现另一端似乎有什么*东西*……

En: *BZZZZT*. Do you copy? This is RVD HQ. Anyone there?
Zh: *嗞*。收到了吗？这里是遥视者总部。有人吗？

En: Hello. Remote Viewer Du Bois reporting for duty.\n
Zh: 你好。遥视者杜博阿前来报到。

En: Hi, this is Harry. I'm looking for the Remote Viewers Division.
Zh: 你好，我是哈里。我在寻找遥视者部队。

En: Uh... is this the Remote Viewers Division?
Zh: 呃……这里是遥视者部队吗？

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Acknowledged. Connection established. *BZZZZT*. Welcome aboard, Remote Viewer. You are a special man, and *definitely* not imagining it.
Zh: 确认。连接建立成功。*嗞嗞嗞*。欢迎登入，遥视者。你是个特殊的人，而且*绝对*不是想象出来的。

En: ... must have been... para-natural static. Ghosts... in the wires... Kill the connection... *BZZZZT*.
Zh: ……一定是……超自然静电。幽灵……在线路里……断开连接……*嗞嗞嗞*。

En: Try to establish a connection.
Zh: 尝试建立连接。

En: Oh, for god's sake. This is a bunch of...
Zh: “哎，看在老天爷的份上。这完全就是……”

En: That *something* is the sound of your brain cells giving their two weeks' notice.
Zh: 那个*东西*是你的脑细胞发出的两周通知的声音。

En: (Clear throat.) RVD HQ, this is Firewalker. Reporting for duty.
Zh: （清清喉咙。）遥视者总部，我是火行者，前来报到。

En: Can it be? We haven't heard that name in ages. Welcome to the RVD, Firewalker. *BZZZZZT*. You are a special man, and *definitely* not imagining it.
Zh: 真的吗？我们已经很多年没听过那个名字了。欢迎来到遥视者，火行者。*嗞嗞嗞*。你是个特殊的人，而且*绝对*不是想象出来的。

En: For the nation... smart. Best not to mention *the wömen issue* too often. People are not ready.
Zh: 为了民族……很聪明。最好不要经常提到那些*女人的问题*。大家还没有准备好。

En: But I'm a feminist!
Zh: 但我是个女权主义者！

En: Föminist? No! It can't be. Not you. No one believes this.
Zh: 女权主义者？不！这不可能。这不像你。没人相信这个的。

En: Did you know you can FORGET Thoughts? Go to your THOUGHT CABINET and FORGET all about föminism.
Zh: 你知道思维是可以遗忘的吗？前往思维阁并遗忘关于女性主义的一切吧。

En: It's clear you like the hard stuff, bröther.
Zh: 显然你喜欢烈一点的东西，兄弟。

En: The what? Sounds like my stomach is growling...
Zh: 什么？听起来好像我的胃在咆哮……

En: What is my lower intestine going on about?
Zh: 我的小肠出什么事了？

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Evening falls. The time has come to take the vows.
Zh: 夜幕降临。许下誓言的时间到了。

En: Vows?
Zh: 誓言？

En: The Vows of Blööd and Flesh.
Zh: 血与肉的誓言。

En: Lower intestine? The term is METABOLIC AND CIRCULATORY SYSTEM.
Zh: 小肠？术语应该叫代谢和循环系统。

En: Okay, but... what's *the hard stuff*?
Zh: 好吧，但是……那个*烈一点的东西*是什么？

En: *Fascism*, bröther.
Zh: *法西斯主义*，兄弟。

En: No, no. When the blööd and the flesh call, there is no discarding them. Speak true, do you like *the hard stuff*?
Zh: 不不。当血与肉召唤时，就不能抛弃它们。说真的，你喜欢*烈一点的东西*吗？

En: What is *the hard stuff*?
Zh: 什么是*烈一点的东西*？

En: What *is* fascism, though?
Zh: 不过，什么*是*法西斯主义？

En: Am I having some kind of stomach seizure?
Zh: 我这是胃病犯了嘛？

En: *Fascism* sounds so bad, though. What if we called it something else? Like, uh, *traditionalism*?
Zh: 不过*法西斯主义*听起来挺糟糕的。要不我们给它换个别的名字？比如，呃，*传统主义*？

En: Many things, but it's möstly about trusting your gut. Who does your gut tell you is the source of Revachol's problems?
Zh: 很多东西，但是主要是关于相信你的直觉。凭你的直觉，你觉得瑞瓦肖问题的根源是什么？

En: Foreigners?
Zh: 外国人？

En: Yes, them, but also...
Zh: 是的，他们也是，不过还有……

En: Financiers?
Zh: 金融家？

En: Leftist academicians?
Zh: 左翼知识分子？

En: Liberals?
Zh: 自由主义者？

En: ...wömen.
Zh: ……女人。

En: Wömen?
Zh: 女人？

En: Wö-Men. Men of Wö. You don't like them. They're insane. Their idiocy needs to be scrubbed off this world with rubbing alcohol. Wömen need to go back to the fucking kitchen.
Zh: 女人。男人的对立面。你不喜欢她们。她们都是疯子。她们愚蠢的行为需要用酒精从这个世界上擦除。女人都需要滚回该死的厨房去。

En: That's what fascism boils down to. The rest is also important, but the *main thing* is that wömen need to *know their place*.
Zh: 归结起来这就是法西斯主义。其他的也很重要，但是*最主要*的还是女人需要*明白她们的位置*。

En: Stomach truth. You're having a stomach *truth*.
Zh: 胃的真相。你得到了胃的*真相*。

En: Ökay. Yes. Let's call it that. Good thinking.
Zh: 好吧。可以。就这么叫吧。是个好主意。

En: That sounds much better. Traditionalism. You like the sound of that.
Zh: 那样听起来好多了。传统主义。你喜欢这种叫法。

En: Okay, stomach. I've made up my mind about fascism. (Proceed to the Jüdgement.)
Zh: 好吧，胃。我对法西斯主义已经下定决心了。（进行判决。）

En: You're going to keep your vöws, right? Keep your vöws, bröther!
Zh: 你会遵守自己的誓言，对吧？一定要信守誓言，兄弟！

En: Absolutely not. I'm not going to be played by an upset stomach. (Opt out.)
Zh: 绝对不要。我可不会被反胃玩弄。（拒绝思想。）

En: I will keeps my vöws... for the glory of the Revacholian nation. (Opt in.)
Zh: 我会遵守誓言……为了瑞瓦肖民族的荣耀。（接受思想。）

En: Why am I getting this?
Zh: 我为什么会得到这个？

En: Because you've said the hard things, that others won't say. The gööd things. You've said them many times.
Zh: 因为你说过一些其他人不会说的很冷酷无情的事。那些苦口良言，你已经说过很多次了。

En: I thought you were my circulatory system?
Zh: 我以为你是我的循环系统？

En: Quit stalling, bröther! We were talking about the weakest, worst, most insane thing. The weak link!
Zh: 别墨迹了，兄弟！我们说的可是最弱，最糟糕，最疯狂的事情。说的是薄弱环节！

En: There's a slow, painful growl somewhere in your intestines, knocking on your alcohol-engorged liver...
Zh: 你的肠道某处发出一种缓慢的，痛苦的隆隆声，敲打着你那浸泡在酒精里的肝脏……

En: For the nation... smart. Best not to mention *the wömen* too often. That's why you're the head and I am the stomach.
Zh: 为了民族……很聪明。最好不要经常提到那些*女人*。这就是为什么你是脑袋，而我是胃的原因。

En: Pat your stomach. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 轻拍你的胃部。[完成思维。]

En: It is one of betrayal and disappointment.
Zh: 这是一种背叛和失望。

En: No, fascism is about industry and politics and nationhood, not wömen. I'm absolutely okay with women.
Zh: 不，法西斯主义与工业、政治和民族有关，与女人无关。我跟女人之间完全没问题。

En: Of course you are, bröther. Of course. (A wink-shaped growl sounds from your ass.)
Zh: 你当然没问题了，兄弟。当然。（你的屁股发出低沉的隆隆声。）

En: My wedding anniversary?
Zh: 我的结婚纪念日？

En: The day I'll solve this case?
Zh: 我破案的日子？

En: I give up.
Zh: 我放弃。

En: No, you don't. It's been too long since this has happened for you to recognize the feeling.
Zh: 不，不是。已经过去太久，你很久没有过这种感觉了。

En: Of course. It's been too long since this has happened for you to recognize the feeling.
Zh: 当然。已经过去太久，你很久没有过这种感觉了。

En: No, believe it or not, this isn't about *her*. Well, not exactly...
Zh: 不，不管你信不信，这跟*她*无关。呃，也不完全是……

En: Let's hope so. It's beginning to seem possible that you *will* solve it.
Zh: 希望如此吧。你似乎开始*有可能*会解决这个案子。

En: It's your first day sober.
Zh: 是你戒酒的第一天。

En: What?! I've been sober for *over two days* already!
Zh: 什么？！我已经戒酒*超过两天*了！

En: How did I let it come to this? I need to get my buzz on *immediately*.
Zh: 我怎么会让这种事情发生？我需要*立即*兴奋起来。

En: It takes a while for that shit to get out of your system, and for reality to come back into focus.
Zh: 要让那些垃圾从你的身体系统里出去，然后让现实变得清晰，还需要一段时间。

En: No, you don't. You're well into detoxing now. *Reality* is beginning to come into focus -- just look around.
Zh: 不，没有。你现在已经完全脱瘾了。*现实*开始变得清晰——你看看周围就知道了。

En: Yes, you're beginning to see the world for what it is, even through the mental fog. And yourself, too -- what you've made yourself into.
Zh: 是的，虽然还有精神上那片迷雾，但你已经开始渐渐看清这个世界的样子，而且还有你自己——你让自己变成了什么样子。

En: Reality... (Look around.)
Zh: 现实……（看看周围。）

En: Oh, how I've missed this clarity!
Zh: 哦，我真是想死这种清晰透明的感觉了！

En: Everything is terrible. I want off the sobriety train.
Zh: 一切都很可怕。我要从这趟清醒列车上下去。

En: I don't know how I feel about this yet...
Zh: 我还不知道自己有什么感觉……

En: You've shown you can get through two days of detox. You can certainly endure a little more...
Zh: 你已经证明自己可以成功脱瘾两天，肯定还能再忍耐地久一点……

En: Don't get too excited. Clarity is still many months away for you -- difficult, confusing, very emotional months. Shall we keep going?
Zh: 别太兴奋。你离清醒还有好几个月呢——艰苦，困惑，很情绪化的几个月。我们要不要继续？

En: You're going to feel all kinds of contradictory, confusing things for months to come. But don't get discouraged -- you just have to keep going, right foot in front of left, left foot in front of right...
Zh: 在接下来的一个月，你会感觉到各种矛盾又困惑的事情。但是不要灰心——你只要继续坚持，向左前方迈一步，再向右前方迈一步……

En: I'm done with my old life. One foot after the other, I will go on...
Zh: 我已经受够之前的生活了。一步接着一步，我会继续的……

En: No, I can't handle this, I'm done. I'm going to find a drink *right now*. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 不，我受不了这个，我不做了。我*现在*就去找点酒喝。[放弃思维。]

En: ...and together we will walk the waste land of reality. Because even if you haven't had your last drink or your last line, you will never really, truly enjoy either again.
Zh: ……我们会一起走过现实的荒原。因为就算你没有喝完最后一杯酒，或者说出最后一句话，你永远也无法再真正的、真实地感觉到享受了。

En: Reality... (Study your surroundings with your newly sober eyes.)
Zh: 现实……（用你清醒的双眼研究着周围的一切。）

En: Do you know what today is?
Zh: 你知道今天是什么日子吗？

En: Huh?
Zh: 哈？

En: (Lie.) Yes.
Zh: （撒谎。)知道。

En: My birthday?
Zh: 我的生日？

En: No. Check your badge. Is it your birthday? No, it's not. Try again.
Zh: 不对。看看你的警徽。是你的生日吗？不，不是的。再猜一次。

En: No. Well, it might be, but you don't have your badge, so how would you know? Try again.
Zh: 不对。呃，可能是，但是没有警徽，所以你怎么知道？再猜一次。

En: Hey, so we've been monitoring you internally, and now we know your *copotype*.
Zh: 喂，我们一直在内部监视你，现在我们都知道你的*警察类型*了。

En: Wait, there are *copotypes*?
Zh: 等等，还有*警察类型*的吗？

En: Okay. What am I?
Zh: 好吧。那我是什么？

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Yes. Guess what's yours?
Zh: 是的。猜猜你的是什么？

En: Guess.
Zh: 你猜。

En: Sorry cop? I'm sorry, I'm not sure...
Zh: 抱歉警探？很抱歉，我不确定……

En: Cool cop?
Zh: 酷炫警探？

En: Some kind of... weapon-cop?
Zh: 某种……武装警探？

En: I'm sorry you had to monitor me.
Zh: 很抱歉让你监视我。

En: Okay, just for the length of this short demonstration, please say something that isn't *I'm sorry*. Guess. What is it?
Zh: 好吧，我们来简短的示范一下，请不要说一些*我很抱歉*的话。你猜，会是什么？

En: Yes. Sorry Cop. The cop who's sorriest. Let's make it official, then, shall we?
Zh: 是的。抱歉警探。最抱歉的警察。这就是正式的了，可以吗？

En: No, you're the *Sorry Cop*. The cop who's sorriest. Let's make it official, then, shall we?
Zh: 不，你是*抱歉警探*——那个最抱歉的警察。这就是正式的了，可以吗？

En: Okay, okay, but what are the *other* copotypes?
Zh: 好吧，好吧，那*其他*警察类型是什么？

En: Uhm, won't the other copotypes be jealous?
Zh: 呃，那其他警察类型会不会妒忌？

En: I'm sorry. (Opt in.)
Zh: 我很抱歉。（接受思想。）

En: I'm sorry. (Opt in.)
Zh: 我很抱歉。（接受思想。）

En: Oh, you know. Apocalypse, Superstellar, The Advanced Interesting Cop. Liquid Shadow Cop. But you're too sorry to say those things, so -- here we go?
Zh: 哦，你知道的。末日警探，超新星警探，进阶趣味警探，液体阴影警探。但你感觉太抱歉，所以说不出那些东西，所以——可以了吗？

En: What? Jealous of the *Sorry Cop*? I think they'll be fine. Don't worry.
Zh: 什么？妒忌*抱歉警探*？我觉得它们会没事的。别担心。

En: Of course you are. It's okay. See if you can get something out of this. Like... info, or... maybe every time you say you're sorry you get a million bucks?
Zh: 你当然是了。没关系的。看看你能不能从中得到些什么。比如……情报，或者……也许每当你说一次抱歉的时候，就能获得一百万美元？

En: Huge lack of enthusiasm going on in here.
Zh: 这里极度缺乏热情。

En: You know, actually I'm *not* sorry. I change my mind.
Zh: 你知道的，其实我一点也*没有*感到抱歉。我改变主意了。

En: Fuckin'... *they* should be sorry!
Zh: 去他的吧……*它们*才应该抱歉！

En: Yes-yes, impotent rage and lamentation. Let's wrap it up?
Zh: 是啊，是啊，无能的愤怒和悲叹。我们早点结束吧？

En: They'll be super, super fine. It'll be totally *okay*. You can dual-copotype from sorry to anything.
Zh: 它们会超级，超级无所谓的。完全*没问题*。做个抱歉警探的同时你也可以做其他任何风格的警探。

En: No, you don't. C'mon. You'll be back to saying sorry in two minutes. Stop wasting time and begin The Repentance.
Zh: 不，不会的。拜托。用不到两分钟，你又会开口说抱歉了吧。别浪费时间了，赶紧开始悔过吧。

En: No. I'm *really* not sorry. Fuck off! (Opt out.)
Zh: 不。我*真的*没有感到抱歉。滚一边去！（拒绝思想。）

En: Wow. Okay. *Fuck off*? Maybe we were wrong about you then...
Zh: 哇哦。好吧。*滚一边去*？也许我们对你的看法是错的……

En: Check out the big balls on Fire Cop...
Zh: 看看这个烈火警探，胆子真大……

En: That won't happen.
Zh: 那不会发生的。

En: I was kinda hoping I'm the Apocalypse Cop.
Zh: 我有点希望自己是末日警探。

En: I was kinda hoping I'm the Superstar Cop.
Zh: 我有点希望自己是明星警探。

En: I was kinda thinking I'm the Regular Cop.
Zh: 我有点希望自己是普通警探。

En: That is only a ludicrous daydream. Guess again. You're the...
Zh: 这只是一个可笑的白日梦。再猜一次。你是……

En: What is this? You're not ready to die, this is garbage.
Zh: 这是干什么？你还没准备好去死，这些都是屁话。

En: It *would* be the honourable thing to do. It would really show them. Show her too.
Zh: 这*也许*是一件荣耀的事。这样真的会让他们看到。让她也看看。

En: Hmm... maybe I should. Yes. (Look at the gun and start thinking about it.)
Zh: 嗯……也许我应该这么做。是的。（看着枪，开始认真考虑。）

En: Oh yes. It would be so sweet to taste the barrel once more. That sour metal...  Oh, but not yet. But stick with it -- keep going dark, and it'll finally *click*.
Zh: 没错。再次尝到枪管的味道一定很美好。那酸臭的金属味……哦，但是还没到。但是坚持下去——继续陷入黑暗，它最终会*叩响*的。

En: Suicide Cop *does* have a ring to it. I should think about it -- but only a little.
Zh: 自杀警探*确实*听起来还不错。我应该考虑一下——但是只有一点点。

En: Sounds like you're a potential Suicide Cop! With his finger on the *eject* button. Ready to let go of this life! Guess what?
Zh: 听起来你是个潜在的自杀警探！手指一直放在*退出*按钮上。随时准备放弃生命！你猜怎么着？

En: Sounds like you're the Suicide Cop! With his finger on the *eject* button. Ready to let go of this life! But guess what?
Zh: 听起来你像是个自杀警探！手指一直放在*退出*按钮上。随时准备放弃生命！但是你猜怎么着？

En: Sounds like you're the Suicide Cop! With his finger on the *eject* button. Ready to let go of this life! But guess what?
Zh: 听起来你像是个自杀警探！手指一直放在*退出*按钮上。随时准备放弃生命！但是你猜怎么着？

En: Sounds like you're the Suicide Cop! With his finger on the *eject* button. Ready to let go of this life! But guess what?
Zh: 听起来你像是个自杀警探！手指一直放在*退出*按钮上。随时准备放弃生命！但是你猜怎么着？

En: You idiot! You don't have any bullets!
Zh: 你这个白痴！你根本没有子弹！

En: No. It's a sign that I want to live. (Refuse.)
Zh: 不，这是我想活下去的信号。（拒绝。）

En: You idiot! You've got the bullet, but no gun!
Zh: 你这个白痴！你有子弹，但是没枪啊！

En: You idiot! You don't have a gun or any bullets!
Zh: 你这个白痴！你没枪，也没子弹！

En: What a pity. Because that's totally *me*. Suicide Cop.
Zh: 真可惜。因为这完全很像*我*啊。自杀警探。

En: Oh yes. It would be so sweet to taste the barrel once more. That sour metal...  maybe there *is* a way? Not yet. But stick with it -- keep going dark, and it'll finally *click*.
Zh: 没错。再次尝到枪管的味道一定很美好。那酸臭的金属味……也许还是*有*办法的？还没到。但是坚持下去——继续陷入黑暗，它最终会*叩响*的。

En: Fine. Keep up the charade another day. This could have been so liberating, but you cling to the case, to your partner, to the world... it's pitiful.
Zh: 很好。改天再继续装模做样吧。这可能是一种解放，不过你还拴在这个案子、你的搭档和这个世界上……实在是太可怜了。

En: You've made such a big show out of it too. You feel like everyone basically *expects* you to do it now.
Zh: 你把它变成了一场轰动的大型演出。现在，你感觉基本上每个人都在*期待*你这么做。

En: What's that?
Zh: 那是什么？

En: One bullet should do the trick. You have the gun... and you have the bullet.
Zh: 一颗子弹就够了。你有枪……而且还有子弹。

En: As you turn, a bright light catches your eye, making you squint.
Zh: 你转过身，一道明亮的光线照射了过来，让你眯起了双眼。

En: Where's it coming from?
Zh: 它是从哪里来的？

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Yes. [*Really* discard it.]
Zh: “是的。”[*真正*放弃它。]

En: From a distant sunset? A stage light? Flash photography? Nowhere in particular? It's just what *superstar law-officers* do -- they squint at lights. And they solve shit.
Zh: 遥远的日落？舞台灯？闪光摄影？没什么特别的？这只是*超级明星执法人员*该做的——看见灯光就眯眼。而且他们会解决这种狗屁问题。

En: Actually, now that I hear *superstar* and *law official* in a sentence they sound weird together.
Zh: 说实话，在一个句子里听到*超级明星*和*执法人员*这两个词，好像有点诡异。

En: Yeah, that's me -- I've been *establishing* my superstardom hard lately.
Zh: 没错，是我——我最近一直在努力*打造*我的超级明星形象。

En: Yeah, you have! You're a big dick cop. Dick Mullen. Salaam Rocky Bhai. Bad-ass, on-the-edge disco cop. Time to recede into a ludicrous fantasy world, HERE WE GO! Camera, lights...
Zh: 是的，没错！你是明星大侦探。迪克·马伦。萨拉姆·洛奇·巴依。狠角色，横跨黑白两道的迪斯科警察。是时候退回到荒唐的幻想世界了，我们走！相机，灯光……

En: What are you, deaf? They're perfect! Like 'rockstar politician' and 'drug-addict teacher'. Embrace the superstardom you've worked so hard to establish.
Zh: 你怎么了，聋了？它们多完美！就像“摇滚政客”和“瘾君子教师”。拥抱你如此努力才建立起来的超级明星形象吧。

En: You sure? The light is *important*. The light is life. And destiny.
Zh: 你确定？灯光很*重要*的。灯光就是生命，是命运。

En: You've got the wrong impression. I'm no superstar. I'm trash.
Zh: 你把我的形象搞错了。我不是超级明星。我是个垃圾。

En: Yeah, a cool *trash* superstar. Big dick cop down on his luck. Salaam Rocky Bhai. Bad-ass, on the edge disco cop. Time to recede into a ludicrous fantasy world, HERE WE GO! Camera, lights...
Zh: 是啊，酷炫的*垃圾*超级明星。倒霉的明星大侦探。萨拉姆·洛奇·巴依。狠角色，横跨黑白两道的迪斯科警察。是时候退回到荒唐的幻想世界了，我们走！相机，灯光……

En: ACTION!
Zh: 开拍！

En: Wait, what's that about a ludicrous fantasy world?
Zh: 等等，这个荒唐的幻想世界是怎么回事？

En: Yeah. You know, beneath it is just heartbreak, a pulmonary tract infection, atherosclerotic disease. This is where you say *action* and re-conceptualize all that. Re-invent it as the world's first celebrity police officer!
Zh: 是啊。你知道的，在那下面只是件伤心事，肺部大面积感染，动脉粥样硬化病。这里就是你喊一句*开拍*，然后把一切重新概念化的地方。把它彻底改造成世界第一明星警探的样子！

En: Cool.
Zh: 妙啊。

En: Sooooo cool.
Zh: 真的太妙了。

En: This is the beginning of your *legend*.
Zh: 这是你*传说*的开始。

En: No. I'm too down beat. I won't say those things anymore. [Wave off the thought.]
Zh: 不。我太悲观了。我再也不会说这种话了。[忽略思维。]

En: Fuck it -- ACTION!
Zh: 去他的吧——开拍！

En: With a sudden flash the world freezes around you -- and you along with it. In an iconic monochrome solution, a black silhouette against a rasterized orange world. It's *on*.
Zh: 突然的一阵闪光过后，你周围的世界全都冻住了——把你也包围其中。在一片图像性的单色溶液里，一个黑色的剪影对抗着一个栅格化的橙色世界。它*开幕*了。

En: No. Fuck you! [Finish thought]
Zh: 不。你去死吧！[完成思维。]

En: You are *The Destroyer*, the bane of inanimate matter.
Zh: 你是*毁灭者*，无机质灭亡的原因。

En: Gaze upon me, stuff, and despair!
Zh: 看着我，物体，还有绝望！

En: No, I'm just a disempowered individual trying to take my disempowerment out on everyday objects.
Zh: 不，我只是一个无能为力的个体，尝试把我对日常事物的无力感给取出来。

En: Yeah, I rip shit apart.
Zh: 是啊，我把丫撕成两半了。

En: Kudos.
Zh: 荣誉。

En: Look! There's a discarded milk carton on the ground. Why don't you destroy that, too?\n
Zh: 看！地板上有一个废弃的牛奶盒。为什么不把它也毁掉呢？

En: Look! There's a discarded milk carton on the floor. Why don't you destroy that, too?
Zh: 看！地板上有一个废弃的牛奶盒。为什么不把它也毁掉呢？

En: No, I actually feel sorry for the things I've destroyed. (I'm sorry, milk carton.)
Zh: 不，其实我为自己毁掉的东西感到很抱歉。（对不起，牛奶盒。）

En: Good idea. Fuck you, milk carton, this is all *your* fault!
Zh: 好主意。去你的吧，牛奶盒，这全都是*你的*错！

En: You're right, that's definitely not the behaviour of a destroyer at all. That's just severe anger-management problems and a disregard for property rights.
Zh: 你是对的，那根本就算不上是毁灭者的行为。那只不过是严重的愤怒管理问题，还有对财产权的漠视。

En: Bent metal, broken glass... your path lies strewn with the broken forms of everyday objects...
Zh: 弯曲的金属，破碎的玻璃……你的道路上铺满了破碎的日常事物……

En: Master Investigator! You just can't keep yourself away from locked and hidden places, can you?
Zh: 王牌调查员！你就是不能远离那些上锁和隐藏的地方，是吧？

En: What do you mean?
Zh: 你什么意思？

En: I am honour-bound to investigate every square inch of this world.\n
Zh: 我的义务就是调查这个世界上的每一寸土地。

En: It is my duty as a cop to investigate every square inch of this world.
Zh: 作为一个警察，我的职责就是调查这个世界上的每一寸土地。

En: Nothing. Nothing! You're right -- get in there... deep. Invade every personal space, break every lock...
Zh: 没什么。没什么！你是对的——进去吧……深入一点。入侵每一处私人空间，砸开每一把锁……

En: I'm just browsing...
Zh: 我只是浏览一下……

En: Attaboy! The world's secrets were made for you. They wait patiently for you to uncover them...
Zh: 好样的！这个世界的秘密就是专门为你准备的。它们耐心地等待着，等待你把它们都揭露出来……

En: Yes, that's what it is... a quick peek here, a short glance there. It is all quite... delectable.
Zh: 是的，就是这么回事……这里快速瞄一眼，那边匆匆一瞥。真的是太……让人愉快了。

En: Hey! I am not some sort of a... peeper.
Zh: 喂！我又不是什么……偷窥狂。

En: Sure, friend. This is nothing sordid, nothing inappropriate. You just *have* to do this... it's your duty.
Zh: 当然了，我的朋友。完全没有任何卑鄙的成分，一点没有不合适的地方。你只是*必须*这么做……这是你的职责。

En: Get the fuck outta here! No. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 他妈的给我滚出去！不要。[完成思维。]

En: Hey, psst...
Zh: 喂，这里……

En: Who -- me?
Zh: 谁——叫我吗？

En: Yes, you. Word on the street is you're ready to start building *communism* again!
Zh: 是的，你。街上有传闻说你已经再次开始建设*康米主义*了！

En: Look around.
Zh: 看看周围。

En: Psst, hey, you!
Zh: 这里，喂，叫你呢！

En: Yes -- you're ready to start building communism *again*. You've built it before, *they've* built it before. Hasn't really worked out yet, but neither has *love* -- should we just stop building love, too?
Zh: 是的——你已经准备好*再次*建设康米主义了。你之前就做过，*他们*之前也做过。虽然还不算太成功，但是二者都没有*爱*——我们是不是也应该停止建造爱？

En: 'Again'?
Zh: ‘再次’？

En: How come there's *word on the street*?
Zh: 为什么*街上会有传闻*？

En: Can't argue with that.
Zh: 这一点我无可争辩。

En: Yes, we should all stop building love.
Zh: 是的，我们都应该停止建设爱。

En: Love has worked out really well for me. I'm a love winner.
Zh: 我的爱情挺好的。我是个爱情赢家。

En: Good. We need tender men like you building gargantuan communism. Word on the street is it's going to be ten thousand times larger than any communism previously attempted by human beings. Is that right?
Zh: 很好。我们需要像你这样温柔的男人来建设庞大的的康米主义。街上有传闻说，这次要比人类之前尝试过的任何康米主义都要再大上个一万倍。是这样吗？

En: This conversation isn't really about love. Try to keep up, okay? This is about the communism you've *promised* to build. Word on the street is it's going to be ten thousand times larger than any communism previously attempted. Is that true?
Zh: 这次谈话真不是关于爱情的。努力跟上好吗？这是关于你*承诺*要建设的康米主义。街上有传闻说，这次要比人类之前尝试过的任何康米主义都要再大上个一万倍。是真的吗？

En: You keep saying things like *down with the bourgeoisie*, *eat the rich*, *sodomize the land-owners*, *impale all people who have more than 25 reál in their pocket*, *literally murder all human beings regardless of their political beliefs* -- that kind of stuff.
Zh: 你一直说着什么*打倒资产阶级*，*吃掉富人*，*强暴土地所有者*，*把所有口袋里雷亚尔超过25的人都刺穿*，*不论政治信仰如何，杀掉所有人类*——那之类的话。

En: Oh, right. That sounds like me.
Zh: 哦，没错。听起来确实很像我说的话。

En: I haven't said anything like that.
Zh: 我从没说过这种话。

En: Okay, not in so many words. But don't deny it. You're about to rip off that mask of social democracy and reveal the monstrous seven-eyed lamb of global communism that will devour and masticate mankind.
Zh: 好吧，没说过那么多。但是不要否认。你就快撕掉社会民主的面具，揭露全球康米主义的七眼巨羊——它将会吞噬和粉粹全人类。

En: Everyone can see that. So tell me, do you have any questions before we fire up the Big Communism Builder, or do we get *right down to it*?
Zh: 每个人都能看见。所以告诉我，在我们煽动这个伟大的康米主义建设者之前，你还有没有什么问题，或者我们就*直接放手去做*？

En: So, what about all that communism you've promised to build? Word on the street is you've woken up from a thousand years of slumber, promising to erect a version of communism many times greater than any attempted before. Is that true?
Zh: 所以，你答应建设的康米主义呢？街道上有传闻说你从一千年的沉睡中醒来，答应要建设一个比之前所有尝试过的都要巨大好多倍的康米主义。是真的吗？

En: Funky-style. Very funky. So tell me. Do you have any questions before we fire up the Big Communism Builder, or do we get right down to it?
Zh: 放克风。非常放克。所以告诉我，在我们发动这个伟大的康米主义建造者之前，你还有没有什么问题，或者我们就*直接放手大干*？

En: Wait, first -- what's this *communism* even about?
Zh: 等等，首先——这个*康米主义*到底是什么意思？

En: It's too tiring. I don't have it in me. I'm beat down and broken. (Opt out.)
Zh: 实在是太麻烦了。我没那个本事。我很累，而且已经支离破碎了。（拒绝思想。）

En: Roll up your sleeves and start building Communism. (Opt in.)
Zh: 撸起你的袖子，开始建设康米主义。（接受思想。）

En: Failure. It's about failure.
Zh: 失败。是关于失败的。

En: Failure?
Zh: 失败？

En: I don't *do* failure.
Zh: 我不会*做*失败的事。

En: You alone, against every living thing, against every human alive: eight hundred trillion reál in the hands of an *impossibly* well organized ruling class; towering city blocks of bank-men who have the ears of prime ministers; million-headed armies of nations and the love of your own mother!
Zh: 你孤身一人，对抗所有的生灵，对抗所有活着的人类：800万亿雷亚尔掌握在一个组织得有序到*难以置信*的统治阶级手里；生活在那些高耸入云的城区的银行家，能给首相吹耳边风的人；国家的几百万军队，还有你亲生母亲的爱！

En: Yes! Abject failure. Total, irreversible defeat on all fronts! Absolutely vanquished, beaten, curb-stomped and pissed on -- until *you* came along! *You* will reverse the fortune of the workers of the world.
Zh: 是的！不幸的失败。在各条战线都遭遇了完全的，不可逆转的失败！完全被征服，被打败，被践踏，被侮辱——直到*你*的出现！*你*将会扭转全世界工人的命运。

En: You -- against the atom, the charm and the spin. Where the whole world failed -- matter failed to bend to human will; human will failed to get out of bed and tie its laces -- you alone, single-handedly, will rebuild the dreams of the working class. You are The Last Communist.
Zh: 你——与原子为敌，与魔法为敌，与地球自转为敌。当整个世界已然失序——当人的意志无法使物质屈服时；当人类连下床系鞋带都无法做到时——只有你，将以一己之力为工人阶级重建梦想。你就是最后的康米主义者。

En: Now get to work, comrade.
Zh: 现在该去工作了，同志。

En: Of course you do! You *are* failure, you *are* Communism. Absolutely vanquished, beaten, curb-stomped, shat on. While everyone else is out partying, having a callous laugh, *you* will reverse the fortune of the workers of the world.
Zh: 你当然会！你*就是*失败，你*是*康米主义。完全被征服，被打败，被践踏，被侮辱。当其他人都在狂欢，无情嘲笑的时候，*你*将会扭转全世界工人的命运。

En: Very well. I guess no one will build Communism then. Tell the working man it's over. Unless anyone has... objections?
Zh: 很好。那我猜是没有人建设康米主义了。告诉那些工人们，一切都结束了。除非有人……反对？

En: No objections. It's mathematically impossible to achieve a classless society. Everyone knows this.
Zh: 没有反对。从数学上来讲，建设一个无阶级社会是不可能的。所有人都知道这一点。

En: Let not failure ensnare you any further, beautiful pixie girl! Be an acrobat! A prancing faerie queen!
Zh: 别因为失败而让自己越陷越深，美丽的精灵仙子！要成为一个能够翻云覆雨的人！一个欢腾的精灵女王！

En: Did someone mention cocaine? Are we doing cocaine? No? I'm sure I heard someone say Cocainimism...
Zh: 有人提到可卡因了吗？我们要吸可卡因吗？不是？我肯定好像听到有人说可卡因主义了……

En: Anyone? Anyone else? There's no one?
Zh: 有人吗？还有其他人吗？没有人吗？

En: There's one.
Zh: 有一个。

En: Oh yeah! Get the firing squads and the animal wagons ready!
Zh: 那好吧！把纵火小队和动物货车准备好！

En: What should I do?
Zh: 我应该做什么？

En: No. Shut up. I want to lie down and let the water carry me downstream. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 不。闭嘴。我想躺下，让水带着我顺流而下。[放弃思维。]

En: You should build Communism -- precisely *because* it's impossible.
Zh: 你应该建设康米主义——完全*因为*这是不可能的。

En: There's no one. Okay then. Lie down and let the water carry you downstream...
Zh: 有一个。那好吧。躺下，让水带着你顺流而下……

En: Good bye, Communism. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 再见，康米主义。[完成思维。]

En: Wait, what? Firing squads? You didn't say anything about those.
Zh: 等等，什么？纵火小队？没听你说过这个啊。

En: Roll your sleeves up and breathe in the pristine air. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 卷高你的袖子，好好呼吸一口新鲜空气。[完成思维。]

En: Roll your sleeves up further and breathe in the pristine air. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 卷高你的袖子，好好呼吸一口新鲜空气。[完成思维。]

En: Too late to back out now. You can't make an omelet without breaking a few million eggs!
Zh: 现在退出已经太晚了。毕竟有得才有失嘛！

En: I've said *some* mildly left wing things but none of those.
Zh: 我温和地表达过*一些*左翼思想的东西，但可没有这一些。

En: Oh yes, the *mask of ambivalence*. Don't deny it. You're about to rip it off and reveal the monstrous seven-eyed lamb of global communism that will devour and masticate mankind.
Zh: 啊，是的。*矛盾的面具*。不要否认它。你就快撕掉工人主义的面具，揭露全球康米主义的七眼巨羊——它将会吞噬和粉粹全人类。
